column.text:
• Baltimore Orioles placed catcher Adley Rutschman on the 7-day injured list with a concussion.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Detroit Tigers placed second baseman Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Arizona Diamondbacks traded infielder Luis Urías to the Toronto Blue Jays for cash.
• Los Angeles Dodgers placed reliever Blake Treinen on the 15-day injured list with right elbow inflammation.
• The Toronto Blue Jays activated outfielder Daulton Varsho from the 10-day injured list.
• New York Mets sent infielder Ronny Mauricio on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Syracuse.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
